# NeuroAI {.unnumbered}

NeuroAI is an integrated Python suite for neuroscience and AI workflows, developed at Meta AI Research. It bridges raw neural recordings and modern deep learning models through four interconnected packages — NeuralSet, NeuralFetch, NeuralTrain, and NeuralBench [@neuroai2026].

## Set environment variables

```python
import os
os.environ["NEURALFETCH_THINGS_PASSWORD"] = "xxx"
```

## Install from the GitHub main branch

```bash
!pip install "neuralset[all] @ git+https://github.com/facebookresearch/neuroai.git#subdirectory=neuralset-repo"
```

## Copy data to personal Google Drive

```bash
!rsync -ah --info=progress2 --stats /content/data/ /content/drive/MyDrive/v2/neuroai/data/
```
